checks.detail: public/manifest.json exists and is valid JSON.
checks.label: Source web manifest

checks.detail: Manifest includes name, short name, start URL, scope, standalone display, and 192/512 icons.
checks.label: Manifest installability fields

checks.detail: public/sw.js registers install/fetch handlers and uses Cache Storage.
checks.label: Source service worker

checks.detail: Exported dist/index.html links the manifest and registers the service worker.
checks.label: HTML manifest and service worker registration

checks.detail: Expo web export copied manifest, service worker, and PWA icons into dist.
checks.label: Exported PWA static assets

checks.detail: Exported dist includes the static MoveNet manifest and every listed model file, and the service worker cache path covers them.
checks.label: Exported static model cache assets

checks.detail: Source and exported PWA include a versioned model-delivery policy, and the service worker uses it before model precache.
checks.label: Model delivery policy

checks.detail: Exported service worker pre-caches Expo JS bundles, router assets, and metadata needed for offline app boot.
checks.label: Exported offline app cache assets

checks.detail: Exported service worker cache version matches the app, model, metadata, and shell asset content hash.
checks.label: Content-addressed service worker cache

checks.detail: vercel.json deploys the Expo web export from dist with static headers and SPA fallback.
checks.label: Vercel static deployment config

checks.detail: Repository does not include Vercel API routes or a backend directory for the PWA path.
checks.label: No backend surface required

summary.nextAction: Deploy the static dist output to Vercel, then run the web smoke against the deployment URL.
